text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for summer camp! It's the perfect
opportunity to train, but some students seem
nervous...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Matikanetannhauser smiles as
brightly as ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As optimistic as ever, she gets on the bus and we
head to the camp.
